title: Epic: Playback Service Fixes
description:
## Epic: Playback State Machine Fix

Master plan: .sisyphus/plans/playback-state-machine-fix.md

### Core Problem
Code violates documented architecture contract - queries MPV state synchronously causing race conditions.

### Tasks (in order)
1. yrmpc-5lj: Route TrackChanged/IdleChanged to Orchestrator
2. yrmpc-psq: Add PendingAdvance transitional state
3. yrmpc-bsh: Event-driven EOF handling (core fix)
4. yrmpc-47s: Play-from-idle semantic
5. yrmpc-wvh: Shuffle fix
6. yrmpc-l18: MPRIS metadata fix

### Success Criteria
- Song finishes → can replay from queue
- Shuffle works visually and functionally
- MPRIS shows correct song
close_reason: Playback state machine fix complete. All 6 tasks implemented: event routing, PendingAdvance state, event-driven EOF, play-from-idle, shuffle fix, MPRIS fix. 796 tests pass.

title: Queue unplayable after EOF without repeat - state/MPV desync
description:
## Task 4 from Plan

### What to do
- In handle_play(): check if state is Idle AND queue has items
- If idle with items: reload current track via play_position(queue.current_index())
- If not idle: just unpause as before

### References
- handlers/playback.rs:10-20 (Current handle_play)
- Oracle: 'Play semantics: if idle, ensure something is loaded'

### Acceptance
- Song ends (repeat=Off) → press Play → song plays
- MPRIS Play command works after queue exhausts
- Normal pause/unpause still works
close_reason: Play-from-idle complete. handle_play checks idle state and reloads track.

title: TopResult parsing incorrectly uses duration as artist name
description:
**Problem**: In search TopResults, duration text is sometimes parsed as the artist name, causing incorrect display.

**Affected Files**:
- `rmpc/src/backends/youtube/adapter.rs` (lines 229, 239, 253, 265 - subtitle uses r.artist)
- `rmpc/src/backends/youtube/api.rs` (lines 475-476 - r.artist insertion)
- Possibly upstream in `ytmapi-yrmpc/src/parse/search.rs` (TopResult parsing)

**Investigation Needed**:
1. Check if ytmapi-rs TopResult struct has incorrect field mapping
2. Verify if YouTube API changed response format for TopResult
3. Add test cases with captured JSON to reproduce

**User-visible Impact**: Artist name shows as duration (e.g., '3:45' instead of actual artist name)

title: Fix EOF race condition - event-driven state machine
description:
## Task 3 from Plan (Core Fix)

### What to do
- Remove get_playlist_pos() call from handle_eof()
- On EndFile(eof): transition to PendingAdvance, don't branch yet
- Add handle_track_changed(position: i32) method to finalize transition
- Add timeout recovery (query after 2s if no event)

### References
- orchestrator.rs:192-280 (Current handle_eof)
- docs/arch/playback-engine.md:174 ('We do NOT rely on MPV's internal state')

### Acceptance
- handle_eof() does NOT call get_playlist_pos()
- handle_track_changed() handles PendingAdvance
- TRACE logs show: EOF → PendingAdvance → TrackChanged(-1) → Idle
close_reason: Event-driven EOF handling complete. handle_eof uses PendingAdvance, handle_track_changed finalizes transitions. LSP clean. Note: shuffle test fails but that's a pre-existing bug (Task 5).

title: 3.1 Implement CacheExecutor core
description:
## Description
Implement the unified CacheExecutor per ADR-002 Rev 2.

## Key Components
- in_flight HashMap for request coalescing
- Tier-based priority handling (Immediate > Gapless > Eager > Background)
- Deadline logic for Immediate tier (200ms default)
- Concurrency limits per tier (2/2/2/1)

## Request Types
- Prepare: playback needs track NOW, returns oneshot
- Preload: fire-and-forget background hint
- Cancel: remove pending work for request_id

## Result Types
- Concat { prefix_path, stream_url, content_length }
- Passthrough { stream_url }
- Failed(msg)

## Files
- NEW: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/services/cache_executor.rs

## Depends on
- yrmpc-a9y (PlayIntent EPIC)
close_reason: Implemented CacheExecutor core per ADR-002 Rev 2. Verified with cargo check.

title: Bug: MPRIS shows wrong metadata after auto-advance
description:
## MPRIS Fix (Refined Investigation)

### Root Cause  
handle_get_current_song() (status.rs L67-72) derives position from:
  queue_pos = playback_base_index + mpv_playlist_pos

But handle_get_status() (L21-27) correctly uses queue.current_index().

INCONSISTENCY in same file! Two functions derive 'current song' differently.

### Fix
1. In handle_get_current_song(): use queue.current_index() directly
2. Remove playback_base_index + mpv_playlist_pos calculation
3. Make both functions consistent

### References
- status.rs:67-72 - THE BUG (handle_get_current_song)
- status.rs:21-27 - CORRECT (handle_get_status)

### Acceptance
- MPRIS shows correct song after auto-advance
- MPRIS shows correct song after shuffle
- playerctl metadata matches TUI now playing
close_reason: MPRIS metadata fix complete. handle_get_current_song uses queue.current_index() directly. Consistent with handle_get_status().

title: Epic: Resilient ytmapi-rs Parsing Architecture
description:
Hybrid approach to make ytmapi-rs parsing resilient to YouTube API changes. Goal: detect changes within 1-2 days, fix within hours.

See plan: /tmp/ytmapi-resilient-parsing-plan.md

Strategy:
- ytmapi-rs: Minimal changes (Unknown variants, optional fields, preserve-raw-json feature)
- rmpc adapter: Heavy lifting (extraction layer, fallback paths, raw re-parsing)
- Testing: Golden fixtures for regression detection

Success Metrics:
- Top Results visible again
- Logs show which fields failed (concise)
- Fix time: 1-2 hours from issue report
- Zero performance regression
close_reason: Completed: Unknown variants added, extract module created, epic implemented

description: From search results, pressing Enter (play+enqueue) plays the song but queue UI doesn't update to show new item. Pressing 'a' (enqueue only) works correctly. Queue sync missing after play action. Need to trigger queue refresh after IntentKind::Play.

title: Bug: Shuffle has no visual effect - queue doesn't reorder
description:
## Shuffle Fix (Refined Investigation)

### Root Cause
set_shuffle_enabled() (L350-365) only sets boolean flag. It does NOT:
1. Regenerate shuffle_order Vec
2. Rebuild prefetch window  
3. Clear stale prefetch_indices

So toggling shuffle mid-playback has NO effect until next play_position() call.

NOTE: build_prefetch_window() and get_next_in_playback_order() are CORRECT - don't touch them!

### Fix
1. In set_shuffle_enabled(): regenerate shuffle_order if enabling
2. In handle_set_shuffle(): trigger prefetch window rebuild
3. Call build_prefetch_window(current_position) after shuffle state changes

### References
- queue_service.rs:350-365 - set_shuffle_enabled (THE BUG)
- handlers/options.rs:53-61 - handle_set_shuffle
- queue_service.rs:455-488 - build_prefetch_window (CORRECT)

### Acceptance
- Toggle shuffle while playing → immediate effect on next track
- shuffle_order is regenerated when shuffle enabled
- Prefetch window reflects new shuffle state
close_reason: Shuffle fix complete. Regenerates shuffle_order on toggle, rebuilds prefetch. Test prefetch_window_respects_shuffle_order now passes.

title: Bug: Queue tab album art floating/overlay covering queue list
description:
Queue pane album art (35% split) renders as floating overlay covering the queue list instead of inline layout. Shows wrong image (generic music note fallback instead of playing song art). Bug present since new UI system was implemented. See screenshots in backlog discussion.

Layout should be: 35% album art | 65% queue list (side by side, not overlapping)

title: Bug: Gapless chunk pre-download not working - cache never hits
description:
Two-stage playback: (1) URL extraction works, (2) chunk download for gapless NOT working.

Prefetch infrastructure exists (audio_cache.rs, 10s prefetch, EDL URLs) but cache never hits. Need to verify audio_cache is being called and chunks are being downloaded.

Goal: Pre-download small chunks (not full song) for gapless streaming without disk waste. Design with dependency inversion for future offline mode support.
close_reason: Fixed by PlayQueue redesign. yyb: prefetch wiring (yrmpc-o3d). e91: intent FSM (yrmpc-g9i). wjq: event-driven integration (yrmpc-jxx).
